figures.caption: Fig. 3. CAMCO negotiation protocol. Agents propose in parallel, proposals are projected and risk-evaluated. If unsatisfied, λ increases and agents repropose; after Kmax failures, escalation to human review.
TABLE III EVALUATION RESULTS ACROSS ENTERPRISE SCENARIOS

Fig. 1. CAMCO architecture within an AI-native enterprise stack. The Agent Layer (blue) handles perception and reasoning; the Coordination Layer (orange) contains CAMCO’s three core components; the Infrastructure Layer (green/purple) provides policy stores, risk models, and audit services.
Fig. 2. Constraint projection visualization. Infeasible proposals (red) are projected to the nearest feasible point (green) within the policy-compliant subset Ci(s).
